scripts.dev: npm run dev:kill-ports && concurrently -n fe,be -c blue,green "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.dev:all: docker compose up postgres redis -d --wait && npm run dev:all:db && npm run dev:all:app
scripts.docker:stack:fresh: docker compose down -v && docker compose up --build -d --wait
scripts.dev:all:db: env-cmd -f apps/backend/docker.local.env npm run db:prepare -w backend && env-cmd -f apps/backend/docker.local.env npm run db:seed -w backend
scripts.dev:all:app: npm run dev:kill-ports && env-cmd -f apps/backend/docker.local.env npm run dev
scripts.docker:db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up postgres redis -d --wait
